title: DOGE vs USAID, Crypto Framework, Google's $75B AI Spend, US Sovereign Wealth Fund, GLP-1s
description:
(0:00) The Besties intro Antonio Gracias!

(3:11) DOGE takes on USAID

(31:44) Sacks breaks in to talk USAID

(34:00) Sacks explains what he's working on: Crypto/AI Frameworks

(46:41) The Democratic Party's shrinking base

(52:33) US Sovereign Wealth Fund + Breaking DOGE/Tax News

(1:09:07) Google to spend $75B on AI buildout in 2025, future of work in the age of AI

(1:23:21) Science Corner: GLP-1 macro study

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast discusses various topics including DOGE vs USAID, crypto frameworks, Google's $75B AI spend, US sovereign wealth fund, and GLP-1s. The hosts also touch on the Democratic Party's shrinking base and the future of work in the age of AI. Antonio Gracias is introduced as a guest, but the main discussion is led by the core hosts. The episode covers a wide range of topics, from politics and economics to science and technology.

takeaways.text: Google to spend $75B on AI buildout
Future of work in the age of AI

sentiment.notes: The hosts discuss various topics with a mix of optimism and caution, reflecting the complexity of the issues at hand.

notable_moments.description: DOGE takes on USAID discussion starts
